finding: Fix 7 {data, error} wrapper requires updating 3 type declaration sites (preload/types.ts, app.tsx Window interface, dialog-manage-agents.tsx local type assertion) plus all 7 callsites in dialog-select-mcp.tsx and dialog-manage-agents.tsx. More surgical: catch errors and return safe fallbacks (empty array on get, silent success on set). No caller changes needed.
repair_path: Replace Fix 7's {data, error} wrapper with try/catch returning fallback empty arrays. This keeps backward compatibility with all callers while still preventing unhandled IPC rejections.

finding: Fix 7's try/catch with silent fallback BREAKS caller error handling. dialog-manage-agents.tsx saveCustomAgents has a try/catch that reverts optimistic state and shows toast on IPC rejection. If Fix 7 catches and returns empty array, the promise resolves successfully — caller thinks data was saved, no toast, stale optimistic state persists.
repair_path: Fix 7 should re-throw after logging: catch (e) { console.error(...); throw e }. This preserves the existing rejection contract so caller try/catch blocks work as designed. Fix 8's serializedWrite catch should also re-throw.

finding: Fix 10 replicates validation functions from ipc.ts in tests. These are pure functions with zero Electron imports — can be exported directly. The existing ipc-plugin-config.test.ts already set this pattern.
repair_path: Export validation functions from ipc.ts (or extract to ipc-validation.ts) and import them in tests. Update existing ipc-plugin-config.test.ts to use imports too.
